description: Search and retrieve Agent Surface documentation. Tools: search_docs (keyword search across 131 pages), get_page (retrieve full page content by slug).

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search Agent Surface documentation by keyword. Returns matching page titles, URLs, and descriptions.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Retrieve the full Markdown content of a documentation page by its slug (e.g. 'discovery/llms-txt').
